markets.question: SS Lazio vs. AC Milan: O/U 2.5
markets.description:
In the upcoming Serie A game between SS Lazio and AC Milan, scheduled for March 15 at 3:45 PM ET:

This market will resolve to "Over" if SS Lazio and AC Milan combine to score 3 or more goals in this game.

If the combined total is less than 3, this market will resolve to "Under".

If the game is postponed, this market will remain open until the game has been completed. If the game is canceled entirely, with no make-up game, this market will resolve 50–50.

If the game is started but not completed, this market will resolve according to the official final score published on legaseriea.it. This market refers only to the outcome within the first 90 minutes of regular play plus stoppage time.

The primary resolution source for this market is the official statistics of the event as recognized by the governing body or event organizers. However, if the governing body or event organizers have not published final match statistics within 2 hours after the event's conclusion, a consensus of credible reporting may be used instead.

markets.question: Stade Rennais FC 1901 vs. Lille OSC: Both Teams to Score
markets.description:
In the upcoming Ligue 1 game between Stade Rennais FC 1901 and Lille OSC, scheduled for March 15 at 3:45 PM ET:

This market will resolve to "Yes" if both Stade Rennais FC 1901 and Lille OSC each score at least one goal during the game.

This market will resolve to "No" if either team fails to score (i.e., if one or both teams finish with zero goals).
